statement: The shared D33 scanner is correct over a closed module-lexical source profile and FAILS CLOSED with the stable diagnostic 'unsupported-module-lexical-profile' on the exact out-of-profile set b1-b6; exactly one optional leading shebang (#! at byte 0, first line, LF/CRLF-terminated) is admitted and stripped before lexing.

The regex-vs-division decision is made by previous-significant-token: a `/` is DIVISION only after a value token (identifier, numeric/string/template/regex literal, this/super/true/false/null, )/]/value-}/postfix), and a REGEX after every other token including every reserved keyword. It is not a hand-maintained keyword allow-list.

The shared resolver and physicalContainment lstat every existing component of the ORIGINAL uncollapsed candidate path (original order) BEFORE any normalization that could collapse a `..` and erase a component; any symlink component is rejected; only genuine ENOENT is absence, every other lstat error fails closed. A backslash in a relative specifier is rejected before resolution.
The per-weaver REQUIRED_INVENTORY_IDS table is exactly the frozen normative table and is proven equal to the ledger's coverage validator by a unit.
LOADER_CAPABLE_BUILTIN_SAFE_EXPORTS is deeply frozen and exactly {module, node:module} -> ["builtinModules", "isBuiltin"]; mutation attempts fail or leave it unchanged.
Each committed weaver implementation-file inventory is PROVEN equal to its derived accepted-relative-module-load closure (D33), never trusted. git -> {registry, git}; code -> {registry, code, util}.

A verified-by edge inferred from a package check/test command carries source_ref = the package.json blob (the manifest bytes evidencing execution), NOT the test file. Import-derived verified-by keeps the test file's own blob. No command is executed.
becomes_normative_when: clotho/scripts/test-test.mjs proves both provenance cases by exact-output tests.

statement: The ledger weaver builds its current-contract clause-resolution index SOLELY from its own counted contract-files source; it receives NO map from the doc-weaver and performs no uncounted fallback read. The iterator is consumed and exhausted whenever the ledger weaver executes — even when the doc-weaver is skipped, when no obligation produces a clause edge, and when every reference is stale.
becomes_normative_when: clotho/scripts/test-ledger-weaver.mjs proves clause resolution independent of any doc-weaver product, with full counted contract-files consumption recorded.

statement: The query interface exposes a closed normative coverage field: coverage is exactly "verified"|"unverified", never optional, never defaulting to verified; coverageUnknown: [] is legal ONLY under a verified manifest proving every consulted producer executed; any other/contradictory value is a test failure.
becomes_normative_when: clotho/scripts/test-query.mjs proves the closed coverage schema + coverageUnknown legality + closed-schema rejection.

statement: At publication time the driver RE-DERIVES the weave, re-reads and re-hashes the sources, exact-compares against the assembled result, and ABORTS on any drift before atomic no-replace publication (D28). The coverage claim is 'the supported statically-declared dependency model at publication time', never a claim of covering every module.
becomes_normative_when: clotho/scripts/test-weave.mjs proves publication-time re-derivation + hash recheck + abort-on-drift + atomic no-replace publish.

statement: Before appending any weaver result the driver requires every edge to carry asserted_by == the invoked weaver id and assertion_status == deterministic-extraction, and every warning.weaver == that same id; a result attributing output to another weaver, human, or model is rejected and the weave aborts.
becomes_normative_when: clotho/scripts/test-weave.mjs proves producer==attribution rejection of mismatched edges/warnings.

statement: The self-weave output directory (docs/runs/clotho-self-weave/) is excluded from EVERY weaver's inventory (D8), so weaving TELOS never ingests its own prior output.
becomes_normative_when: docs/runs/clotho-self-weave/run.mjs + clotho/scripts/test-flagship.mjs prove the self-weave exclusion and reproduction from committed bytes.
